posts.raw_content:
**Israel.** Thats literally the *only* reason.

Why don’t you support the Iran War, pede?

> ISRAEL is why we are at war.

Why don’t you want Charlie’s murderer executed Pede?

> ISRAEL killed Charlie.

Why are you pushing anti-Trump hoaxes, pede?

> ISRAEL controlled Epstein. ISRAEL controls Trump.

Pretty weird, considering the topic of ISRAEL virtually never came up on this site at any point from 2016-2022. If it did, it was usually people celebrating Trump moving the embassy to Jerusalem and finally crushing Palestine and ISIS. Now all of a sudden we have 10 users named ImReallyAnAmerican spamming ISRAEL BAD in every thread.

These people are shills. Their goal is to take focus off of destroying the left/Islam. It doesn’t matter what you think about Israel, like them or not, this behavior simply is not organic and the goal is to take heat of the left/Islam by constantly misdirecting.

Keep all this in mind when you read this, the nine principles of propaganda. Note that the shills use all of these tactics.

**The Nine Principles of Propaganda**

**1. LIE BIG**
Big lies work better than small lies because the masses won’t believe that anyone would lie “about that.”

> Israel controls the world!

**2. FOCUS**
Don’t make it complicated, ignore history, keep it simple for simple minds.

> AIPAC is a lobby bro. Therefore, Israel controls the world. Never mind that they’ve even a close American ally for 70 years 

**3. REPEAT**
People cannot tell the difference between facts and familiarity. The same words repeated over and over will become true in their minds.

*every thread spammed with the same talking points, no matter how asinine*

**4. BLAME**
Never credit the other side, always blame, debase, defame, and dehumanize.

> America killed a top Islamic terrorist using Israeli intelligence? That doesn’t matter. Israel sucks! Israel is why you’re broke and can’t get a date

**5. PROVOKE**
Outrage, fear, and resentment are more powerful than reason, logic, or facts.

> AIPAC spends money influencing our Congress. This is an outrage! This proves everything Israel ever does is bad, always, including when they help us kill Muslim terrorists.

**6. CRISIS**
Issues must be life or death, good vs evil, love vs hate, us vs them. Urgency defeats objection.

> if we don’t stop them America will be destroyed!

**7. EMOTION**
A person might question facts, but they will never question their own feelings. Go emotional.

> There’s a worldwide pedophile ring controlled by Israel. It’s so dark and evil that you don’t need evidence it exists. It’s just very bad so you are a terrible pedo protector if you don’t believe it.

**8. PANDER**
Praise allies generously, demonize all who disagree as having bad intentions or non-expert.

> you are a cool kid if you hate Israel. You are neocon scum if you don’t. 

(Works especially well on Gen Z, which is still in an adolescent phase and worried about being “cool”)

**9. NO LIMIT**
The victor’s morality won’t be questioned. Morality is for losers.

> Slander Charlie Kirk’s widow. Slander Donald Trump. Simp for Muslims. Morality doesn’t matter.
